_schema.purpose: Operator-committed snapshot of Teams deposit state per sector. Overwritten by the operator's snapshot script (not by collect.R).

fields.snapshot_taken_at: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the operator's last refresh
fields.snapshot_source: How the operator generated this snapshot (e.g. 'manual', 'teams_inventory.ps1')

<code>.deposited: boolean — whether the canonical file exists at the expected shared Teams path
<code>.rows: integer — observation count in the deposited file (null if not deposited)
<code>.indicators: integer — distinct indicator count (null if not deposited)
<code>.size_mb: numeric — file size on Teams (null if not deposited)
<code>.path_teams: string — canonical shared Teams path (internal path withheld)
<code>.deposit_date: YYYY-MM-DD — date producer last deposited (null if not deposited)

nt.notes: 1.16M rows x 40 indicators on Teams (operator-confirmed today)

hva.notes: 214k rows x 23 indicators (reviewer-mode overwrite incident filed as cso-toolkit#54)

im.notes: not deposited to Teams (reviewer ran locally to repo)

ws.notes: not deposited to Teams (reviewer ran locally to repo; 3 outputs hhs/sch/hcf)

mnch.notes: 15k rows x 27 indicators on Teams; CRITICAL: a derived output is written directly to canonical raw storage, bypassing dw_save

cme.notes: no Teams deposit expected (sector publishes via a separate regional-aggregate path)

ed.notes: 107k rows x 16 indicators on Teams (step 2/5 only; 3/5 blocked on the World Bank API on the reviewer network)

wt.notes: 6 indicators in scope; pipeline BLOCKED on a Java dependency + an Excel column-schema mismatch + an undeposited upstream population cache

ecd.notes: 8 indicators in scope; pipeline BLOCKED on producer-side machine paths + an undeposited input workbook on Teams
